interface.longDescription: From everyday data questions to high-level strategic analyses, Spotter by ThoughtSpot helps business and data teams get answers and insights they can trust, validate, and act on, enabling everyone to use data to drive the business forward.
defaultPrompt: Search ThoughtSpot for sales performance answers and summarize the key drivers.
Find dashboards related to pipeline health and explain the biggest movement this quarter.
Analyze revenue by segment in ThoughtSpot and highlight anomalies worth investigating.
